channel.title: Proteinai on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA
channel.description: Recent content in Proteinai on Sinclair Huang, HEC Liège, Executive DBA

item.title: From Structure to Behaviour: Why Protein AI Is Entering the Dynamics Era
item.description: *AlphaFold helped us predict what proteins look like. The next wave of models is starting to address something harder: how proteins move, switch states, and perform functions over time.**By Po-Sung(Si
